title: The Alchemist
author: Paulo Coelho
description: A philosophical novel about a young shepherd named Santiago who dreams of discovering his personal legend.

title: Atomic Habits
author: James Clear
description: A practical guide to building good habits, breaking bad ones, and achieving lasting success.

title: Rich Dad Poor Dad
author: Robert T. Kiyosaki
description: A personal finance classic that challenges conventional beliefs about money and investing.

title: Ikigai
author: Hector Garcia
description: Discover the Japanese philosophy of finding purpose, happiness, and longevity.

author: George Orwell
description: A dystopian novel exploring surveillance, authoritarianism, and the loss of freedom.

title: To Kill a Mockingbird
author: Harper Lee
description: A timeless story of justice, morality, and compassion in the American South.

title: The Psychology of Money
author: Morgan Housel
description: Explains how human behavior influences financial decisions more than technical knowledge.

title: Deep Work
author: Cal Newport
description: Learn how focused work can help you achieve extraordinary productivity in a distracted world.

title: Sapiens
author: Yuval Noah Harari
description: A fascinating exploration of the history and evolution of humankind.

title: Think and Grow Rich
author: Napoleon Hill
description: A motivational classic that outlines principles for achieving success and financial independence.
